mapper.select: SELECT t.* FROM tb_psm_incident t WHERE t.deleted = 0 ORDER BY t.occur_at DESC, t.created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_psm_incident WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT t.* FROM tb_psm_incident t WHERE t.id = #{id} AND t.deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_psm_incident WHERE incident_no LIKE #{prefix} + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_psm_incident ( incident_no, incident_type, occur_at, location, related_equipment, related_material, first_finder, reporter, investigator, reported_at, narrative, severity, human_factors_json, technical_factors_json, why1, why2, why3, why4, why5, management_cause, deaths, serious_injuries, minor_injuries, injury_type, damaged_equipment, property_loss, production_loss, downtime_hours, env_impact, recovery_date, actions_json, technical_action, managerial_action, similar_check_plan, psm_improvement, status, created_by, modified_by, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{incidentNo}, #{incidentType}, #{occurAt}, #{location}, #{relatedEquipment}, #{relatedMaterial}, #{firstFinder}, #{reporter}, #{investigator}, #{reportedAt}, #{narrative}, #{severity}, #{humanFactorsJson}, #{technicalFactorsJson}, #{why1}, #{why2}, #{why3}, #{why4}, #{why5}, #{managementCause}, #{deaths}, #{seriousInjuries}, #{minorInjuries}, #{injuryType}, #{damagedEquipment}, #{propertyLoss}, #{productionLoss}, #{downtimeHours}, #{envImpact}, #{recoveryDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{actionsJson}, #{technicalAction}, #{managerialAction}, #{similarCheckPlan}, #{psmImprovement}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'DRAFT'), #{createdBy,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, #{modifiedBy,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_psm_incident SET incident_type = #{incidentType}, occur_at = #{occurAt}, location = #{location}, related_equipment = #{relatedEquipment}, related_material = #{relatedMaterial}, first_finder = #{firstFinder}, reporter = #{reporter}, investigator = #{investigator}, reported_at = #{reportedAt}, narrative = #{narrative}, severity = #{severity}, human_factors_json = #{humanFactorsJson}, technical_factors_json = #{technicalFactorsJson}, why1 = #{why1}, why2 = #{why2}, why3 = #{why3}, why4 = #{why4}, why5 = #{why5}, management_cause = #{managementCause}, deaths = #{deaths}, serious_injuries = #{seriousInjuries}, minor_injuries = #{minorInjuries}, injury_type = #{injuryType}, damaged_equipment = #{damagedEquipment}, property_loss = #{propertyLoss}, production_loss = #{productionLoss}, downtime_hours = #{downtimeHours}, env_impact = #{envImpact}, recovery_date = #{recoveryDate,jdbcType=DATE}, actions_json = #{actionsJson}, technical_action = #{technicalAction}, managerial_action = #{managerialAction}, similar_check_plan = #{similarCheckPlan}, psm_improvement = #{psmImprovement}, status = #{status}, modified_by = #{modifiedBy,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_psm_incident SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
